wikitext.*:
====Pokémon Scarlet and Violet====
Iono first appears when the player takes on her [[Levincia Gym#Gym Test|Gym Test]], hosting a livestream titled "Where in Levincia is Mr. Walksabout?" While on stream, the player must find [[Clavell|Director Clavell]] in various locations in the city. During the Gym battle, Iono is still shown to be streaming, and upon being defeated, Iono gives out the Electric Badge and the [[TM]] for [[Volt Switch]].

After the player becomes [[Champion]], Iono will still be at her Gym, anticipating a visit from [[Geeta]] for a Gym inspection. She is surprised to find the player carrying out the inspection instead, but will nonetheless readily challenge the player to a battle. Once defeated, she will request that the player tell Geeta what a sensation she was during the battle.

In [[The Indigo Disk]], Iono can appear in the [[Blueberry Academy]] [[League Club Room|League Club]] as a special coach, and can be found [[League Club Room/Interactions|speaking with]] [[Brassius]], [[Larry]], [[Tulip]], [[Grusha]], [[Clavell]], or [[Salvatore]]. In her conversations with the {{player}}, she reveals that she's taking this opportunity at the academy for her next stream, coming up with the title “Gym Leader Iono INFILTRATES this WEIRD ACADEMY! You won’t BELIEVE what she finds!”<ref name=SVGameScriptTIDIonoClickbait>''"Lemme hit you with the eyeball-snatching title I brainstormed for my next stream... “Gym Leader Iono INFILTRATES this WEIRD ACADEMY! You won’t BELIEVE what she finds!”" - Iono''</ref> She then asks the player what her focus should be on, and if the player suggests the director, [[Cyrano]], she describes how risky it could be to bring on a "snoozer guest", and how it'd be a "Top 10 Iono Betrayals moment..."<ref name=SVGameScriptTIDCyranoRoast>"''The...director? Like, the boss-man guy? You sure? Sounds kinda bori— uh, risky! If I bring on a snoozer guest, that’d be a real Top 10 Iono Betrayals moment..." - Iono''</ref> If suggested in their initial meeting, Iono will report back on her second visit to the League Club that Cyrano's appearance made her viewer count rise dramatically due to his natural charisma.<ref name=SVGameScriptTIDCyranoRedemption>''"The moment Mister Director-guy came on stream, my viewer count went WHOOSH! To the moon!!! Where’d that guy even come from?! No way was that his first time on a stream! He was so magnetic he even stole MY thunder! Who gets more eyeballs than me?! I ’unno!" - Iono''</ref> After beating her in a rematch, she will give the player the [[List of clothing in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet#Rotom Phone|Iono Zone Case]] as a gift, which she describes as an ''"SSS-tier drop!"''<ref name=SVGameScriptTIDPhoneCase>''"...Meh! Viewer numbers are viewer numbers! As thanks, here’s an SSS-tier drop! Some mega-exclusive Iono merch!" - Iono''</ref>
